iPhone Repair in Jamsil — Master-Level Direct Service at Daolrepair

iPhone repair near Lotte Tower or Jamsil? Daolrepair Gasan branch is 35 minutes away by Line 2. Lotte Tower workers often drop off during lunch and pick up after work.

DongPyeong Geum — Korea's #1 Device Prevention Master2026-05-11

Why Choose Daolrepair Gasan Branch

Many Lotte Tower workers and Jamsil residents.

  • Master direct repair — No outsourcing, all work done by certified master in-house
  • Same-day repair — Screen and battery replacement in 30-60 minutes
  • 90-day warranty — Free re-repair for the same issue
  • Zero-cost on failure — Even for water damage and mainboard issues, you pay nothing if we can't fix it
  • 2,000+ Naver reviews — Average 4.9 stars across all 3 stores
  • English-friendly service — Use KakaoTalk channel "Daolrepair" for chat-based estimates with photos

How to Get to Daolrepair Gasan Branch

From Jamsil Station, take Line 2 to Sadang, transfer to Line 1 to Gasan Digital Complex (about 35 minutes).

You can also send photos via KakaoTalk to get a quote first — no need to come without preparation.

Common Repair Categories

  • Screen replacement — Cracked glass, broken LCD, ghost touch
  • Battery replacement — Fast drain, swollen battery, sudden shutdown
  • Charging port — Won't charge, loose connection, debris
  • Water damage — Even days after the spill, recoverable in many cases
  • Camera, speaker, microphone — Component-level diagnosis
  • Mainboard repair — Chip-level repair instead of full board swap (significant cost saving)

Nationwide Delivery Repair Available

If you can't visit our store, we offer nationwide delivery repair across South Korea. Send your iPhone via courier (Korean post or any delivery service), and we'll diagnose, repair, and ship back within 2-3 days. Same master, same warranty.

📍 Daolrepair Gasan Branch

Open weekdays 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Saturdays 11:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sundays closed. Credit cards accepted with 2-6 month interest-free installment.
